## Checklist

- [ ] Example runs locally without errors
- [ ] Example runs in StackBlitz without errors
- [ ] No SDuX Vault internals are exposed (voting, traces, revotes, deny/abstain, queue/timer internals)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No cross-example imports or shared dependencies between examples
- [ ] Each modified example is self-contained and standalone
